id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7414143476171820056","book_info":{"abstract":"（聊天群+听劝系统+群穿+炸天帮）

陈寺被选中加入聊天群，一小时后，千人即将集体穿越修仙界。

危机四伏，每批存活率仅1%，好在每人都有一次开局抽奖。

有人抽到嗨丝，当场破防。

有人抽到平底锅，概念保命。

有人抽到AK47，无限弹药。

有人抽到蘑菇弹，立马去了一趟小日子打算光宗耀祖。

陈寺一发入魂！抽到【听劝系统】，只要听取建议就能获得各种逆天奖励！

......

「陈寺：刚弄到一本御剑术，应该怎么修炼？有懂的吗？」

「群友：啊这？御剑术？哥们这不有手就行吗（滑稽）直接大圆满好吧！」

【听劝任务触发！】

【任务：请确保有手！】

【奖励：御剑术大圆满，领悟初级剑意 】

【任务完成，奖励已发放！】

陈寺：......？
_____
短短数年过去。

陈寺丹符器阵等万道至尊加身，三千道祖之位尽收囊中，证道唯一至高天帝！

回首一望，群友全麻了......

“不是哥们？！我辛辛苦苦修炼，准备飞升呢，你说仙界被你给扬了？！”

——————
《每天三个听劝任务，群友全麻了》
《每日听劝，群友口嗨我成帝！》
《这么帅的读者姥爷，要是进来选上一两个系统，包起飞的好吧！》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oac37a272a85349498e3b97e2d09d44d6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"出门遛猪","author_id":"","book_id":"7414143476171820056","book_name":"有手就行？叮！有手！任务完成！","book_short_name":"睥睨苍生","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#503020","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7414143531414995480","read_count":"17237","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1247092"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"562","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,聊天群,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/80e24d167004f3f60c55153379de6322~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779384605&x-signature=cp4U7v3jpW0R0s7n6%2F5jk0B4AP8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"20222108244748","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"92"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230130054A98C36FFD1493BD7F76"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_c
